name: Focus Session
description: Persists Pomodoro focus-session state for the Focus Flow app (start/get_state/finish), so Anna can read the timer as the source of truth.
_comment: The publish metadata (slug/name/version/executa_type) is read by `anna-app apps publish` / `anna-app executa publish`; the dev fields (tool_id/type/enabled) are read by `anna-app dev`. The `distribution` block (type:binary + binary_urls) makes the Agent install a self-contained PyInstaller binary per platform from this repo's GitHub Release (tag `focus-session-v<version>`), built by .github/workflows/anna-app-publish.yml; on `anna-app apps cut` matrix-nexus mirrors the bytes into apps.anna.partners R2 and pins sha256 (so no self-hosting / no sha256 needed here). Run `anna-app dev` from the app root to launch this executa locally. To switch to the Node.js or Go flavour, set `enabled: false` here and `enabled: true` in the corresponding sibling executa.json (only one focus-session can be active per app). This dir is the `focus-session` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas.
